items.name_en: Bottega Veneta collector-grade mini-weave is truly the best!! Bottega Veneta's most classic mini woven handbag is back!! We used the highest quality leather paired with top-tier craftsmanship ❤️ to create the most precious works. We pioneered the Intrecciato leather weaving technique ❤️. This unique traditional exclusive leather weaving method has not only become our signature but also embodies the time-consuming craftsmanship of our products ❤️. The brand new TOSCA handbag is definitely a selected piece worth collecting 🆕

items.name_en: MiuMiu|New Retro Matte Small Square Bag
items.name_cn:
MiuMiu|New Retro Matte Small Square Bag
Concise and sharp design highlights functionality, soft matte embossed logo, and a grand bag silhouette. Minimalist with no excessive decoration, the bag has ample capacity, serving as a daily commuter bag or a short-trip travel companion. Simple yet not simplistic; almost every fashion blogger has one🌱
Size:22*10.5*7.5cm
Model:5BB142

items.name_en: {Mini/Black} First Release
items.name_cn:
{Mini/Black} First Release
Miu Mi^mini Aventure Bag Charm
Turn a "best-selling handbag" into a charm. Following Miu's trend of turning best-selling items into charms, this includes Aventure, Arcadie, and Box Bag charms. The combination of large and small bags looks seamless, blending fashion and beauty. The mini bag can be used as a bag charm or crossbody, holding lipstick and car keys🔑. The ultimate aesthetic in the bag world🫶🏻
Size:Base Length 13×Base Width 5×Height 9cm

items.name_en: Original Miu Miu corduroy tote is so dreamy!! So cute
items.name_cn:
Original Miu Miu corduroy tote is so dreamy!! So cute
5BB117: New Miu Miu corduroy tote, a perfect fusion of fashion and classic, exquisite and casual, corduroy fabric paired with calfskin, soft and durable texture, lighter and more versatile than full leather, stunning in both appearance and practicality, three-generation long handle design for shoulder carrying, large size with ample capacity to easily hold various essentials, perfect for work or travel, new canvas lining for a more beautiful and durable look, Dimensions: 34X23X12cm (with original packaging🎁)

items.name_en: Original leather 5BG291, New arrival vintage tote bag, made with new soft lambskin leather, soft and premium texture. Inspired by Miu's archival design, this Aventure Nappa leather bag has a restructured, lighter form with a fresh personality. Features embossed letter logo, vintage gold hardware, linen blend lining, zip pocket and patch pocket. Long handle suitable for hand or shoulder carry. Dimensions: 31X40X13CM

items.name_en: MiuMiu Mini Shell Handbag/Crossbody Bag is now live!!
items.name_cn:
MiuMiu Mini Shell Handbag/Crossbody Bag is now live!!
Who can refuse a retro and playful shell bag? The faded leather color and texture paired with a metal belt buckle looks premium and vintage. Made of lambskin with a refined design and a square retro shape.
Switch between hand, underarm, and crossbody carry!
Elegant for commuting, super easy to wear. Join MiuMiu 👧🏻 now!
Size:21X13.5X 8cm
Model:5BP090
